summary: Tension map created for all 22 chapters with fantasy, romance, and overall tension values (1-10 scale). No INV-020 violations detected — proper pacing rhythm maintained throughout. Identified 4 primary recovery chapters (7, 10, 18, 22) strategically placed after high-intensity sequences. Tension peaks correctly aligned with major structural beats: midpoint (Ch11, tension 9), black moment (Ch16, tension 10), and climax (Ch21, tension 10). All chapters contain micro-tension seeds per INV-035. Prescriptive guidance provided for chapter outliner and drafter.

keyFindings.tensionRange: Overall tension ranges from 4 (opening/resolution) to 10 (black moment and climax)
keyFindings.pacingVerdict: PASS — No INV-020 violations. No three consecutive chapters at similar tension levels.

recoveryPoints.description: Recovery after departure (Ch6). Establishes journey rhythm.
Recovery after pinch point one (Ch9). Investigation provides breathing room.
Partial recovery after black moment. Shift from despair to agency.

tensionPeaks.note: Oathbrand removal, magic return, resonance bond

keyFindings.actOnePacing: Steady escalation 4→7. Minor note: chapters 4-6 maintain medium-high tension (6,6,7) but this is acceptable for Act I climax build. Recovery comes immediately in Ch7.
keyFindings.actTwoPacing: Proper rhythm with recovery chapters (7, 10) and strategic peaks (9, 11, 14, 16). False victory (Ch15, tension 7) correctly sets up black moment devastation.
keyFindings.actThreePacing: Sustained crisis (17), partial recovery/pivot (18), dual peaks (20-21), resolution (22). Correct pattern for Act III.
keyFindings.microTensionCompliance: All chapters include multiple micro-tension seeds per INV-035: unanswered questions, dramatic irony, time pressure, secrets, approaching consequences.

prescriptionsIssued.forChapterOutliner: Detailed prescriptions provided for each chapter to calibrate scene-beat intensity. Low-tension chapters must still maintain micro-tension through unanswered questions or character vulnerability.
prescriptionsIssued.forChapterDrafter: microTensionSeeds array provides specific tension continuity mechanisms for each chapter. Every scene must maintain at least one active tension source.
prescriptionsIssued.forCraftEnforcer: Verify INV-035 during chapter audit — no half-page passage without tension. Check that recovery chapters don't become flat.

invariantsVerified: INV-020 (Pacing Variation): PASS — No 3 consecutive chapters at same tension level
INV-035 (Micro-Tension Continuity): Specified in microTensionSeeds for all chapters
INV-051/T13 (Tension Mapping): artifact created with visual/textual pacing chart
notes: Tension values are calibrated to story's 'darkly romantic, morally complex' tone. Scale 1-10 where even 'low' tension (3-4) includes ambient threat.
Recovery chapters (7, 10, 18, 22) are not 'no tension' — they shift from external/physical tension to internal/emotional tension.
False victory (Ch15) intentionally creates reader dread through dramatic irony — reader knows contract will be revealed.
Black moment (Ch16) correctly positioned at Act II close. Highest overall tension (10) reflects dual-arc collapse.
Act III maintains high baseline tension (6-10 except resolution) because stakes are existential and time-critical.
Chapter 22 resolution drops to tension 4 — provides necessary emotional landing without triumphalism per tone contract.
